title: liatris aspera var. intermedia
intro: Liatris aspera var. intermedia, also known as rough blazing star, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its purple flowers and coarse foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats. The health benefits of Liatris aspera var. intermedia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal properties. Liatris aspera var. intermedia can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to treat various health conditions.
